id: create-using-post-3
title: "Create application"
description: "Requires <b>applications.create</b> authority for authenticated user"

api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/eshopReference/hc-oneclick-api-installments
custom_edit_url: null
---

import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create application"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/financing/v1/applications"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Requires <b>applications.create</b> authority for authenticated user

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["merchantUrls","order","type"],"properties":{"customer":{"type":"object","properties":{"addresses":{"type":"array","description":"addresses. Only `PERMANENT` and `CONTACT` types are allowed.","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"addressType":{"type":"string","description":"type of the address. Only some of the types are allowed in each context.","enum":["PERMANENT","CONTACT","DELIVERY","BILLING"]},"city":{"type":"string","description":"city"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"name on address"},"streetAddress":{"type":"string","description":"street/city part"},"streetNumber":{"type":"string","description":"street number"},"zip":{"type":"string","description":"postal code"}},"title":"FinancingV1Address"}},"email":{"type":"string","description":"E-mail address of customer"},"extraData":{"type":"object","properties":{"cartItemsRemoved":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Total count of removed items form shopping basket during current shopping"},"cashlessTransactionsNumber":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Historical count of customer's cashless transactions made in partner's e-shop"},"cashlessTransactionsSum":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"},"earliestTransactionDate":{"type":"string","format":"date","description":"oldest transaction date on partner e-shop"},"itemsViewed":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Number of viewed pages with products"},"latestTransactionDate":{"type":"string","format":"date","description":"newest transaction date on partner e-shop."},"pageReviewsTime":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Total time spent on partners website in review and comments sections (in seconds)"},"pageTotalTime":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Total time spent on partners website (in seconds)"},"transactionsNumber":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Historical count of customer's cash transactions made in partner's e-shop"},"transactionsSum":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"}},"title":"FinancingV1CustomerExtraData"},"fingerprintComponents":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["key","value"],"properties":{"key":{"type":"string"},"value":{"type":"object"}},"title":"KeyValue"}},"firstName":{"type":"string","description":"Customer first (given) name"},"fullName":{"type":"string","description":"Customer full name, including academical degrees and salutation."},"ipAddress":{"type":"string","description":"IPv4 or IPv6 address of a customer"},"lastName":{"type":"string","description":"Customer last (family) name"},"phone":{"type":"string","description":"Phone number with country code (including leading `+`)"},"tin":{"type":"string","description":"tax identification number (ICO)"}},"title":"FinancingV1ApplicationRequestCustomer"},"merchantUrls":{"type":"object","required":["approvedRedirect","rejectedRedirect"],"properties":{"approvedRedirect":{"type":"string","description":"URL of the partner used for redirection of the customer back to partner website (from HCO gateway) after application approval."},"notificationEndpoint":{"type":"string","description":"URL of the partner used as a notification endpoint for obtaining important updates about application (approval, rejection, storno, etc.)."},"rejectedRedirect":{"type":"string","description":"URL of the partner used for redirection of the customer back to partner website (from HCO gateway) after application rejection."}},"title":"FinancingV1MerchantUrls"},"order":{"type":"object","required":["items","number","totalPrice"],"properties":{"deliveryType":{"type":"string","description":"delivery type, for `DELIVERY_CARRIER` type can be further specified by DeliveryCarrier attribute.Typ doruceni. Dopravcem, osobni prevzeti, online doruceni atd.","enum":["DELIVERY_CARRIER","ONLINE","PERSONAL_BRANCH","PERSONAL_BRANCH_WITH_ASSISTANCE","PERSONAL_PARTNER"]},"items":{"type":"array","description":"order items","items":{"type":"object","required":["name","totalPrice"],"properties":{"code":{"type":"string","description":"internal code for item (internal to e-shop). Used to better identify the item for future changes","minLength":0,"maxLength":100},"ean":{"type":"string","description":"EAN code","minLength":0,"maxLength":32},"image":{"type":"object","properties":{"content":{"type":"string","description":"File content (Base64 encoded, maximum size of encoded string is 500kB)"},"filename":{"type":"string","description":"file name"},"url":{"type":"string","description":"File URL"}},"title":"FinancingFile"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"item name"},"producer":{"type":"string"},"quantity":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Item quantity"},"totalPrice":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"},"type":{"type":"string","description":"item type","enum":["DIGITAL","DISCOUNT","FEE","GIFT_CARD","INSURANCE","PHYSICAL","SALES_TAX","SHIPPING_FEE","STORE_CREDIT"]},"unitPrice":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"}},"title":"FinancingV1ApplicationRequestOrderItem"}},"number":{"type":"string","description":"order number (internal for e-shop)"},"reservationDate":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","description":"Date and time until order is reserved. After this date, e-shop does not guarantee items availability (if application processing is longer, it may endanger order fullfillment)."},"totalPrice":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"},"variableSymbols":{"type":"array","description":"variable symbols (internal for e-shop)","items":{"type":"string"}}},"title":"FinancingV1ApplicationRequestOrder"},"precheckIds":{"type":"array","description":"Array of all precheck ids related to this application. See precheck operations and it's response (PrecheckResults).","items":{"type":"string"}},"settingsConsumerLoan":{"type":"object","properties":{"preferredDownPayment":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"},"preferredInstallment":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"},"preferredMonths":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Preferred number of installments (in months)"},"productCode":{"type":"string","description":"Product code, this indicates previous calculation result"},"productSetCode":{"type":"string","description":"Product set code, this will limit further calculations"}},"title":"FinancingV1FinancingSettings"},"settingsGoodsFinancing":{"type":"object","properties":{"preferredDownPayment":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"},"preferredInstallment":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"},"preferredMonths":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Preferred number of installments (in months)"},"productCode":{"type":"string","description":"Product code, this indicates previous calculation result"},"productSetCode":{"type":"string","description":"Product set code, this will limit further calculations"}},"title":"FinancingV1FinancingSettings"},"settingsInstallment":{"type":"object","properties":{"preferredDownPayment":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"},"preferredInstallment":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"},"preferredMonths":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Preferred number of installments (in months)"},"productCode":{"type":"string","description":"Product code, this indicates previous calculation result"},"productSetCode":{"type":"string","description":"Product set code, this will limit further calculations"}},"title":"FinancingV1FinancingSettings"},"type":{"type":"string","description":"Financing type","enum":["CONSUMER_LOAN","GOODS_FINANCING","INSTALLMENT"]}},"title":"FinancingV1ApplicationRequest"}}},"description":"request","required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","content":{"*/*":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["id","state"],"properties":{"customer":{"type":"object","properties":{"addresses":{"type":"array","description":"addresses. Only some of the types are allowed in each context.","enum":["PERMANENT","CONTACT","DELIVERY","BILLING"]},"city":{"type":"string","description":"city"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"name on address"},"streetAddress":{"type":"string","description":"street/city part"},"streetNumber":{"type":"string","description":"street number"},"zip":{"type":"string","description":"postal code"}},"title":"FinancingV1Address"}},"email":{"type":"string","description":"E-mail address of customer"},"firstName":{"type":"string","description":"Customer first (given) name"},"fullName":{"type":"string","description":"Customer full name, including academical degrees and salutation."},"lastName":{"type":"string","description":"Customer last (family) name"},"phone":{"type":"string","description":"Phone number with country code (including leading `+`)"},"tin":{"type":"string","description":"tax identification number (ICO)"}},"title":"FinancingV1CustomerBase"},"gatewayRedirectUrl":{"type":"string","description":"Gateway redirect URL. Redirect user to this URL if state is PROCESSING and stateReason is PROCESSING_ADDITIONAL_DATA or PROCESSING_VERIFICATION or PROCESSING_REDIRECT_NEEDED."},"id":{"type":"string","description":"Unique identifier in HCO"},"order":{"type":"object","required":["items","number","state","totalPrice"],"properties":{"deliveryDate":{"type":"string","format":"date","description":"date and time of delivery"},"deliveryTrackingNumber":{"type":"string","description":"delivery tracking number"},"deliveryType":{"type":"string","description":"delivery type, for `DELIVERY_CARRIER` type can be further specified by DeliveryCarrier attribute.Typ doruceni. Dopravcem, osobni prevzeti, online doruceni atd.","enum":["DELIVERY_CARRIER","ONLINE","PERSONAL_BRANCH","PERSONAL_BRANCH_WITH_ASSISTANCE","PERSONAL_PARTNER"]},"items":{"type":"array","description":"order items","items":{"type":"object","required":["name","state","totalPrice"],"properties":{"code":{"type":"string","description":"internal code for item (internal to e-shop). Used to better identify the item for future changes","minLength":0,"maxLength":100},"deliveryDate":{"type":"string","format":"date","description":"date when item was delivered. Only when the whole order was NOT sent at once."},"deliveryTrackingNumber":{"type":"string","description":"Tracking number for the item. Only when the whole order was NOT sent at once."},"ean":{"type":"string","description":"EAN code","minLength":0,"maxLength":32},"image":{"type":"object","properties":{"content":{"type":"string","description":"File content (Base64 encoded, maximum size of encoded string is 500kB)"},"filename":{"type":"string","description":"file name"},"url":{"type":"string","description":"File URL"}},"title":"FinancingFile"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"item name"},"producer":{"type":"string"},"quantity":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Item quantity"},"sentDate":{"type":"string","format":"date","description":"date when item was sent.
